[See [[tag groups]].]

[expand=Table of Contents]
* 1. "About":#dtext-about
[/expand]

These are the possible changes fan artists make that differentiate their works from canon.

h4#major. Major changes
* [[Alternate species]]
* [[Animalization]]
* [[Foodification]]

h4#whole_attire. Changes of the whole attire
* [[Adapted costume]]
* [[Alternate costume]]
** [[Costume switch]]
** [[Casual]]
** [[Contemporary]]
** [[Enmaided]]
** [[Costume combination]]
* [[Cosplay]]
** (For instructions about specific "cosplays" of characters, see the [[cosplay]] tag)

h4#specific. Changes of specific clothes or accessories
* [[Alternate headwear]]
* [[Alternate weapon]]
* [[Bespectacled]] (added eyewear)

h4#see_also. See also
* [[Tag groups]]
